About This Story

In this powerful story, Jordan faces workplace discrimination. She fights back against doubt and proves her worth. Jordan becomes a leader and mentor to others. This story shows her journey of overcoming barriers. It is an inspiring story about achieving success despite discrimination.

Imagine you work harder than anyone else. You arrive early. You stay late. You do everything right. But you are still treated differently. You are still excluded. People doubt you because of who you are. They make you feel small. They make you want to give up. But what if you did not give up? This is the story of Jordan—a story of discrimination, determination, and triumph.

Workplace discrimination affects millions of people around the world. People face discrimination based on race, gender, disability, age, and other factors. Many are excluded or treated unfairly at work.
